questions.question:
For the distributions given below:

Which of the following is correct for the above distributions?



ISRO CSE 2020 | Question: 56
options: Standard deviation of \( A \) is significantly lower than standard deviation of \( B \)
Standard deviation of \( A \) is slightly lower than standard deviation of \( B \)
Standard deviation of \( A \) is same as standard deviation of \( B \)
Standard deviation of \( A \) is significantly higher than standard deviation of \( B \)
questions.correct_answer: Standard deviation of \( A \) is same as standard deviation of \( B \)
